purpose: Define the non-secret evidence needed to prove authenticated production login, session cookie, CORS, protected APIs, and reviewer-safe data paths before PWA pilot expansion or app store submission.

officialReferences.name: Apple App Review
officialReferences.whyItMatters: Restricted app functionality must be accessible to reviewers with clear instructions and reviewer-safe setup.

officialReferences.name: Google Play login credentials for app access
officialReferences.whyItMatters: Review credentials must be valid, reusable, location-independent, and sufficient to access restricted functionality.

officialReferences.name: MDN Set-Cookie
officialReferences.whyItMatters: Production session evidence must confirm Secure and SameSite behavior for authenticated browser/PWA sessions.

officialReferences.name: MDN Cross-Origin Resource Sharing
officialReferences.whyItMatters: Production API access must be pinned to expected web and Capacitor origins instead of broad wildcard access.

requiredInputsOutsideRepository.secretHandling: Record only the username or redacted username if it is safe for store review notes; never record the password here.
Store the real password in a password manager or store console review field; repository evidence may record only the secret reference name.
Confirm PUBLIC_APP_ORIGIN=https://www.zkraiflow.top and CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS are set in the hosting platform.
Confirm CONSOLE_AUTH_COOKIE_SECURE=true on HTTPS and record only the redacted Set-Cookie attributes.

commandPlan.authenticatedPublicSmoke: SMOKE_BASE_URL=https://www.zkraiflow.top SMOKE_USERNAME=<review account> SMOKE_PASSWORD=<from password manager> npm run cloud:smoke
commandPlan.seedReviewData: REVIEW_BASE_URL=https://www.zkraiflow.top REVIEW_USERNAME=<review account> REVIEW_PASSWORD=<from password manager> npm run review:seed

evidenceRequired: cookie attributes are redacted but show Secure on HTTPS
SameSite is consistent with production auth/CORS plan
user role is reviewer or approved review-safe role
response does not expose password, token, API keys, or internal secrets
public origin and dry-run state match the runbook
review account can access its data-rights request path
account deletion or export request path is reachable
admin-only queues are not exposed unless the review role is intentionally admin
required Capacitor origins are documented if native shells call the API
wildcard origin is not used for authenticated production API calls

sampleEvidenceRecord.command: SMOKE_BASE_URL=https://www.zkraiflow.top SMOKE_USERNAME=<redacted> SMOKE_PASSWORD=<password-manager> npm run cloud:smoke
sampleEvidenceRecord.reviewAccountReference: password-manager item or store-console field name only

closeoutGates: Dedicated review account exists and its real password is stored outside the repository.
npm run review:seed succeeds against https://www.zkraiflow.top or the chosen review environment.
Authenticated npm run cloud:smoke succeeds against https://www.zkraiflow.top.
Cookie attributes and CORS origin proof are redacted and recorded without raw secrets.
Review notes in App Store Connect and Google Play Console match the same account and reviewer path.
release-blockers-register keeps public launch and store submission blocked until this evidence is captured.
